headline: NDAQ Q1 Deep Dive: AI and Cloud Growth Drive Strong Start for Nasdaq
summary: Global exchange operator Nasdaq (NASDAQ:NDAQ) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 13.7% year on year to $1.41 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.96 per share was 3.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Nasdaq Announces Mid-Month Open Short Interest Positions in Nasdaq Stocks as of Settlement Date April 15, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, April 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- At the end of the settlement date of April 15, 2026, short interest in 3,689 Nasdaq Global MarketSM securities totaled 16,579,123,734 shares compared with 16,513,796,397 shares in 3,694 Global Market issues reported for the prior settlement date of March 31, 2026. headline: Nasdaq Inc (NASDAQ:NDAQ) Passes the “Caviar Cruise” Quality Screen
summary: Quality investing focuses on well-run businesses, not cheap stocks. Nasdaq Inc passes the "Caviar Cruise" screen, showing strong revenue growth, 123% ROIC, manageable debt, and consistent dividend growth.
